pages.text: $(bold)The Nanosuit Boots$() ground your enhancement system with advanced traction and stabilization. Fused into your body through nanobot integration, they provide unparalleled grip and shock absorption while enabling specialized movement modes.$(br2)$(bold)Protection Level:$() Equivalent to Netherite
Foot protection with integrated traction and stabilization systems.

$(bold)Key Features:$()$(br)- $(bold)Perfect Traction:$() No slipping on ice or slippery surfaces$(br)- $(bold)Shock Absorption:$() Extra fall damage reduction beyond leggings$(br)- $(bold)Terrain Adaptation:$() Move swiftly through difficult terrain

$(bold)Special Ability - Dash Movement:$()$(br)When your complete nanosuit is active, the boots enable a brief speed boost by crouching and releasing. This fast, directional movement consumes $(l:u_heroes:life_essence)Life Essence$(/l) and can be used for evasion or rapid repositioning.$(br2)Requires full suit activation and adequate essence reserves.
